hooks.command: f=.claude/push_count; n=$(cat "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); n=$((n+1)); echo "$n" > "$f"; if [ $((n % 15)) -eq 0 ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Push #%d reached. Per project convention, run a workspace review now: invoke the /structure skill, then scan fetch.py, analyze.py, and their test files for dead code (unused functions, constants, imports) and redundant tests. Remove anything dead before the next push."}}' "$n"; fi
